title: Fermented Beets Polish Stir-fry
description: A cozy and chewy Polish dish featuring fermented beets combined with a mix of vegetables in a paleo-friendly stir-fry.
instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Add finely chopped beets and onions to the heated wok. Sauté for about 5 minutes until they start to soften but not browned.
Stir in minced garlic, diced bell peppers, and zucchini. Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes until vegetables are just tender.
Reduce heat to medium-high and add paleo-friendly soy sauce to the mixture. Stir well to coat all ingredients evenly with the liquid.
Continue cooking for an additional 1-2 minutes until slightly thickened and glossy, making sure not to burn the beets or vegetables.
Serve hot as a side dish.
